message:
feat: implement 'rust_proxy check' configuration validation command (rust_proxy-4ce)

Add comprehensive pre-flight configuration validation similar to nginx -t.

Features:
- Validates proxy configurations (URLs, auth, duplicates)
- Validates target domains (format, protocol prefix, paths)
- Validates settings (ports, intervals, timeouts, backoff)
- Validates active proxy reference
- JSON output with --json flag
- Strict mode with --strict (treats warnings as errors)
- Quiet mode with --quiet (suppresses success messages)

Exit codes:
- 0: Configuration valid
- 1: Configuration has errors
- 2: Warnings with --strict
- 3: Config file unreadable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
